---
title: "Abdelkarim el Ghani"
subtitle: "Statistical Data Analyst | Neuroscientist"
toc: false
page-layout: custom
section-divs: false
format:
  html:
    template-partials:
      - _assets/title-block.html
    css:
      - index.css
      - https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css
      - https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/animate.css/4.1.1/animate.min.css
resources:
  - "_assets/**"
  - "images/**"
  - index.css
---


::: {.hero}
<div class="hero-overlay"></div>

::: {.hero-content}
<div class="hero-text animate__animated animate__fadeInDown">
[![](https://readme-typing-svg.herokuapp.com?font=Lobster&size=50&pause=2000&color=2D333B&center=true&width=512&height=100&lines=Hi+there!;Welcome+to+my+portfolio!)](https://git.io/typing-svg)
</div>

::: {.btn-container .animate__animated .animate__fadeInUp}
[Explore Projects](projects.qmd){.btn}  
[About Me](about.qmd){.btn .btn-secondary}
:::

<div class="social-links animate__animated animate__fadeInUp animate__delay-1s">
  <a href="https://twitter.com/yourusername" target="_blank" aria-label="Twitter">
    <i class="fab fa-twitter"></i>
  </a>
  <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/yourusername" target="_blank" aria-label="LinkedIn">
    <i class="fab fa-linkedin"></i>
  </a>
  <a href="https://github.com/yourusername" target="_blank" aria-label="GitHub">
    <i class="fab fa-github"></i>
  </a>
</div>

<div class="scroll-down animate__animated animate__pulse animate__infinite">
  <a href="#about">
    <i class="fas fa-chevron-down"></i>
  </a>
</div>
:::
:::
